name: Sole Filets Stuffed with Spinach Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Season 12 half-filets with lemon, salt, and pepper. Set aside in the refrigerator.
2. In a food processor, process the remaining fish for 30 seconds. Add spinach, salt, pepper, and nutmeg, and process another 30 seconds.
3. Pour egg white through the feeding tube, still processing, and process for 30 seconds.
4. Chill for 2 hours.
5. Stir 2 tablespoons of cream into the chilled spinach mousse. Place 1 tablespoon of mousse in each filet of fish and roll it up.
6. Place rolls standing in a buttered baking dish. Pour wine over, cover with foil, and bake in a pre-heated 350°F oven for 25 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, prepare the sauce: Cook shallots and mushrooms in butter until all liquid has evaporated. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Pour in fish stock and stir until thick.
8. Stir egg yolks into cream and add to sauce, stirring. Bring to a boil and pour around fish.
9. Serve with mashed potatoes.
